g.title: NSEM7
g.text: NSEM-7 · Nonseminoma — Response After Primary Treatment (residual masses)

g.title: a_res_tx
g.text: (EP or TIP or VIP or VeIP)

g.title: b_rising_tx
g.text: or Surgery in highly select cases

g.title: b_stable_tx
g.text: or Surgery in highly select cases

g.title: b_res_tx
g.text: (EP or TIP or VIP or VeIP)

g.title: note
g.text: Refer to high-volume center for residual masses with abnormal markers.
Teratoma with somatic-type malignancy → histology-directed therapy at high-volume GCT unit.
Surgery in highly select cases: resectable retroperitoneal-only disease, factors precluding chemo, cystic components.
